name: io.github.nikulk2992-jpg/prismhr-mcp
title: PrismHR MCP
description: Open-source MCP server for PrismHR. PEO workflow tools + Microsoft 365 connectors.

environmentVariables.name: PRISMHR_MCP_PEO_ID
environmentVariables.description: PrismHR PEO identifier. Ask your PrismHR admin for the value assigned to your web service user.

environmentVariables.name: PRISMHR_MCP_USERNAME
environmentVariables.description: PrismHR API username. Alternatively use 1Password via PRISMHR_MCP_ONEPASSWORD_VAULT + PRISMHR_MCP_ONEPASSWORD_ITEM_PRISMHR.

environmentVariables.name: PRISMHR_MCP_ONEPASSWORD_VAULT
environmentVariables.description: 1Password vault name (requires op CLI signed in). Overridden by direct USERNAME/PASSWORD.

environmentVariables.name: PRISMHR_MCP_ALLOW_PROD
environmentVariables.description: Must be 'true' to allow PRISMHR_MCP_ENVIRONMENT=prod. Safety default keeps first-run posture on UAT.
